svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1F3864;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1F3864, #abc0e6); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: The Cumulative Stack — Why Stages Cannot Be Skipped

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 38px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Each stage subsumes all stages below it. Higher stages inherit and depend on every discipline that precedes them.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 240, 240), rgb(31, 31, 31)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(204, 204, 204), rgb(62, 62, 62));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 70px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #444444;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#444444, #b3b3b3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: What this stage adds

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 240, 240), rgb(38, 25, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(192, 0, 0), rgb(255, 167, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 568px; height: 1px; padding-top: 70px; margin-left: 1042px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #C00000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#C00000, #ffa7a7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Risk if this stage is skipped or skimped

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 534px; margin-left: 382px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #888888;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#888888, #787878); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ← each stage contains all stages below

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 638px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 392px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font: CMMI L6 — Transcending · The Transcendent Era

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(249, 240, 255), rgb(34, 26, 39)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(112, 48, 160), rgb(214, 159, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 13px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Requires S1–S5. Adds AI-native APIs, environment maps, data legibility standards. Re-architects the world agents operate in.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 245, 245), rgb(31, 23, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(192, 0, 0), rgb(255, 167, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 568px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 1043px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Environment ossification. Agents must navigate legacy infrastructure forever. Ambiguity is a prompt problem, not a design problem. Technical debt re-accumulates at the infrastructure level.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(28, 28, 28), rgb(213, 213, 213)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(212, 160, 23), rgb(143, 98, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 638px; height: 1px; padding-top: 192px; margin-left: 392px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #D4A017;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#D4A017, #8f6200); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font: CMMI L5 — Optimising · The Operational Era

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 252, 232), rgb(23, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(212, 160, 23), rgb(143, 98, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 192px; margin-left: 13px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Requires S1–S4. Adds self-monitoring, self-healing runtime envelope. Context quality sensors. Harness manages agent health, re-routes failures, auto-rolls back deployments.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 245, 245), rgb(31, 23, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(192, 0, 0), rgb(255, 167, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 568px; height: 1px; padding-top: 192px; margin-left: 1043px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: The Dark Factory cannot see itself. Failures accumulate silently. No self-correction. Context rot goes undetected. A single bad assumption cascades across all agents simultaneously.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(45, 55, 72), rgb(183, 191, 206)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(28, 28, 28), rgb(213, 213, 213));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 638px; height: 1px; padding-top: 264px; margin-left: 392px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #D4A017;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#D4A017, #8f6200); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font: CMMI L4 — Quant. Managed · The Governance Era

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(244, 246, 248), rgb(25, 26, 28)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(45, 55, 72), rgb(183, 191, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 264px; margin-left: 13px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Requires S1–S3. Adds policy-as-code, specification corpus, audit linkage. Every agent decision is traceable to a rule. Entry point of the Dark Factory.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 245, 245), rgb(31, 23, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(192, 0, 0), rgb(255, 167, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 568px; height: 1px; padding-top: 264px; margin-left: 1043px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Ungoverned autonomy. Agents act without accountability. No audit trail. Compliance violations cannot be detected or attributed. The Dark Factory is legally and operationally indefensible.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 578px; height: 1px; padding-top: 311px; margin-left: 522px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #D4A017;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#D4A017, #8f6200); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ◀ DARK FACTORY BOUNDARY — Stages 4–6 operate autonomously ▶

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(237, 125, 49), rgb(195, 98, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(197, 90, 17), rgb(222, 130, 67));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 638px; height: 1px; padding-top: 360px; margin-left: 392px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font: CMMI L3 — Defined · The Strategy Era

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 236), rgb(36, 25, 20)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(237, 125, 49), rgb(195, 98, 33));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 360px; margin-left: 13px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Requires S1–S2. Adds intent manifests, trade-off hierarchies, value constraints. Agents act with awareness of organisational goals, not just task instructions.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 245, 245), rgb(31, 23, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(192, 0, 0), rgb(255, 167, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 568px; height: 1px; padding-top: 360px; margin-left: 1043px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Intent drift. Agents produce technically correct, strategically wrong outputs. They optimise for measurable proxies rather than actual goals. Humans keep overriding — defeating the purpose of automation.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(112, 173, 71), rgb(70, 123, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(55, 86, 35), rgb(154, 181, 137));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 638px; height: 1px; padding-top: 432px; margin-left: 392px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font: CMMI L2 — Managed · The Systems Era

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(242, 249, 236), rgb(21, 27, 16)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(112, 173, 71), rgb(70, 123, 35));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 432px; margin-left: 13px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Requires S1. Adds systematic context management: RAG, retrieval pipelines, structured context windows, bounded agent workflows. Quality criteria: relevance, sufficiency, isolation, economy, provenance.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 245, 245), rgb(31, 23, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(192, 0, 0), rgb(255, 167, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 568px; height: 1px; padding-top: 432px; margin-left: 1043px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Agents operate blind. Without engineered context, models hallucinate, miss relevant information, and cannot maintain coherent state across steps. Context rot sets in immediately. Outputs are unreliable at scale.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(46, 117, 182), rgb(94, 155, 211)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(31, 56, 100), rgb(171, 192, 230));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 638px; height: 1px; padding-top: 504px; margin-left: 392px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font: CMMI L1 — Initial · The Craft Era (foundation layer)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(235, 243, 251), rgb(23, 30, 37)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(46, 117, 182), rgb(94, 155, 211));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 504px; margin-left: 13px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: The baseline capability. Establishes human ↔ model communication: system prompts, few-shot examples, chain-of-thought cues. Everything above depends on this being solid.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 245, 245), rgb(31, 23, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(192, 0, 0), rgb(255, 167, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 568px; height: 1px; padding-top: 504px; margin-left: 1043px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: No working baseline. Teams cannot reliably communicate intent to a model. Every higher stage depends on being able to prompt effectively — without this, all subsequent engineering is built on sand.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-end; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 284px; margin-left: 311px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #888888;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#888888, #787878); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Cumulative stack

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 236), rgb(36, 25, 20)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(237, 125, 49), rgb(195, 98, 33));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 574px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #444444;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#444444, #b3b3b3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: The most dangerous gap is Stage 3 → 4: organisations that enter the Dark Factory without encoded intent find their agents are autonomous but directionless — compliant with rules, but not aligned with goals.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
